title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE's DJ VIDEO🎧
【electrodream】


今回はMisha Panfilov - Maracuja Lounge からThe High Llamas - The Passing Bell への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
スペーシーな音作りと南国的な残り香の共存が印象的なMisha Panfilov、そして子供の頃の夕暮れ時を思い出すかのようなThe High Llamasの楽曲をお楽しみください。

This time, we’re bringing you a transition scene from Misha Panfilov’s “Maracuja Lounge” to The High Llamas’ “The Passing Bell.”
Enjoy Misha Panfilov’s striking blend of spacey production and tropical afterglow, along with The High Llamas’ track that feels like recalling dusk in childhood.
